notes: Swiss-Dutch specialty ingredients giant with the iconic PARSOL® UV filter brand. PARSOL® 1789 (avobenzone) is the world's most widely used UVA filter. Comprehensive portfolio covering mineral, chemical, and next-generation UV filters with global regulatory approvals. Essential supplier for any sun care formulation. Strong photostability data and formulation support.
